title: Yumemigusa
description: A highly customizable leaf trajectory and physics optimization mod that brings a vivid sense of wind to your world.
body:
This mod slightly modifies the movement logic of falling leaves, giving every leaf a unique flight path. All specific settings can be adjusted in real-time via the in-game configuration screen.

*   For the Fabric version, ModMenu is required to access the configuration interface.
*   For versions below 1.21.5, installing this mod standalone will only modify the trajectory of cherry blossoms; however, if Falling Leaves is also installed, its leaf trajectories will be modified as well. Please note that this mod is not compatible with Falling Leaves on versions 1.21.5 and above.
  
![Example](https://resource-api.xyeidc.com//client/members/pics/02c0c1cf)

If you have any other ideas or suggestions, feel free to let me know!
